MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HATOYAMA, JUN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-11-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, EDWIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 227 9TH STREET, SF, CA 94102, STAYED UNTIL APR-14-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO VACATE PREMISES BY 5PM 4/14/94. IN RETURN PLTF WILL WAIVE ALL RENTS UNTIL 4/14/94 IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,230.00.
